creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 253933
Fix guiaddons conflict

Hi,

I created the attached patch.

Adds an option to enable guiaddons semparately, that implies KDE if enabled.

The only difference in upstream code caused by not having guiaddons is related to clipboard management [1]

@vvd can you test it and report back if this actually fixes your issue?


[1] https://github.com/nextcloud/desktop/blob/a9fe12325b559a0923939f18cda48bc65a129899/src/gui/socketapi/socketapi.cpp#L79
